channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Iran currently has no decision to send a negotiating delegation to Pakistan, Tasnim reports
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran Says No Decision Yet On Sending Negotiators To Pakistan, Urges End Of Naval Blockade
- Iran not planning to attend talks with US in Pakistan
- Pakistan, Iran yet to confirm second round of US-Iran talks
- Tehran has not decided whether to join new talks with U.S. in Pakistan: Iranian state media
- Tehran has not decided whether to join new talks with US: Iran media
- Iran not sending negotiating team to Pakistan due to US blockade
- Flash: Iran says no delegation will go to Pakistan for U.S. talks if naval blockade continues -- report
- Iran to decide on talks with US only after naval blockade is lifted — agency
- Iran Has Not Yet Decided to Send Delegation for Talks With US - Reports
- Iran says no date set for next round of negotiations with US
- Iran says no date set for next round of negotiations with US]]>

item.title: Louisiana shooting leaves 8 children dead: Police

- Shreveport, Louisiana's scary history of mass shootings in focus; mayor calls incident 'worst tragedy'
- Louisiana mass shooting: Why Shreveport suspect fatally shot 8 children, others? Police share update
- At least eight children die in shooting incident in US’ Louisiana — TV
- Eight children killed in Louisiana mass shooting
- Eight children killed in mass shooting in Louisiana, US media reports
- Mass shooting rampage in Louisiana leaves eight children dead and others wounded
- Shreveport shooting update: 5 things to know as 8 kids, suspect killed in domestic dispute
- Shreveport shooting suspect: First details on shooter who killed 8 kids revealed; update on motive
- 8 children dead in mass shooting in Louisiana, gunman killed
- Mass shooting in US: 8 kids aged between 1 and 14 dead in Louisiana
- US mass shooting leaves 8 children dead in Louisiana
- Louisiana mass shooting: Eight of 10 victims are children, police say; suspect shot dead
- Mass shooting in Louisiana leaves 8 children aged 1–14 dead: Police
- Shreveport mass shooting update: What happened in Cedar Grove today? 8 kids dead, latest on suspect
- 8 children between the ages of 1 and 14 are dead after a mass shooting in Louisiana, police say]]>

- Iran war: Tehran vows response to US seizure of cargo ship
- US seizes Iranian cargo ship as Tehran rejects a second round of peace talks
- US says it seized Iranian ship refusing to comply with blockade
- US military seized Iranian-flagged container ship, Trump says
- US intercepts and seizes Iranian-flagged cargo ship, Trump says
- Iran denies ship capture, says US operation ‘failed’

- Trump says US seized ship trying to breach Iran blockade

- Trump accuses Iran of 'total violation' of ceasefire, says US going to Pakistan to resume negotiations
